name: chain_the_chillest_business_you_can_run_right_
method:
The chillest business you can run right now is building AI UGC FB / IG pages 

you can just become an affiliate for a brand and get paid $500 - 2k retainers per page you run + affiliate commissions

stages.task: Scan affiliate networks for brands accepting FB/IG page affiliates in our niches (faith, fitness, tech)
Generate AI UGC content batch (5-10 posts) per niche page using existing content_factory + image_factory
Draft affiliate application emails to matched brands using existing cold outreach templates
Track page metrics (followers, engagement, affiliate clicks) weekly
